title: Device(headset) inventory details
scenario: Poly Lens app displays correct headset device details (model, serial number, last detected, software version) under General > Account after login
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Lens app on the mobile device.
2. Log in to the Poly Lens account with valid credentials.
3. Navigate to the Account screen (General > Account).
4. Locate the device inventory section on the Account screen.
5. Identify the connected headset device in the inventory list.
6. Tap on the connected headset device to view its details.

7. Verify the following device details are displayed:
   - Model name/number
   - Serial number
   - Last detected date/time
   - Software/firmware version
expected: The connected headset device details (model, serial number, last detected, and software version) are displayed correctly and match the actual device information.
